title: How Do I Contact BuyAndScrap Support?

content:
# How Do I Contact BuyAndScrap Support?

Got a question about buying or selling a car? Wondering **how do I contact BuyAndScrap support** to get a quick answer? You’ve come to the right place! At BuyAndScrap.com, we want to make sure getting help is as straightforward as selling or buying your next car. We’re here to help you every step of the way, and there are a few easy ways to get in touch.

## How to Get in Touch with BuyAndScrap

We believe in making things simple. While we don't offer a traditional phone line for general enquiries (it helps us keep costs down and prices competitive for you!), our online support channels are designed to get you the answers you need quickly and efficiently.

### Your First Stop: Our Help Centre

Before you ask, "how do I contact BuyAndScrap support directly?", it's always worth checking our comprehensive Help Centre. We've packed it full of answers to the most common questions about listing your car, finding a vehicle, payments, and much more. You might find the solution you're looking for instantly! It's designed to be a quick self-service tool available 24/7.

### Need Direct Support? Use Our Contact Form

If you can't find what you're looking for in our Help Centre, or if your query is specific to your account or a particular transaction, then using our online contact form is the best way to reach us. It ensures your message goes directly to the right team, allowing us to help you faster. You can find the contact form easily accessible from the 'Contact Us' link in our website footer.

### What to Include in Your Message

To help us resolve your query as quickly as possible when you ask "how do I contact BuyAndScrap support?", please include the following:
*   **Your full name and email address** associated with your BuyAndScrap account.
*   **Your car's registration number (VRN)** if your query is about a specific vehicle.
*   **Any relevant order or reference numbers.**
*   **A clear, concise description** of your issue or question. The more detail you provide upfront, the less back-and-forth there will be.

## When to Expect a Reply

We know you want answers fast, and we work hard to get back to everyone promptly. We aim to respond to all enquiries submitted via our contact form within 1-2 working days. Please bear with us during busier periods; we promise we haven't forgotten about you! Checking your spam/junk folder is also a good idea, just in case our reply takes a detour.

We hope this clarifies **how do I contact BuyAndScrap support**. We're always here to lend a hand and ensure your experience with us is smooth and enjoyable.

Ready to find your next car or list your current one?
